allow: Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content supabase\\seed_ceemart.sql -Raw\) -replace ', is_available\\\)', '\)' -replace ', true\\\)', '\)' | Set-Content supabase\\seed_ceemart.sql -Encoding utf8")

Bash(grep -rn "^\\s*//\\s*\\\(Animated check\\|Activation code\\|Redemption note\\|Summary\\|Booking ref\\|Copy button\\|View Code\\|Colored side band\\|Date chip\\|Description\\|Tier options\\|Event header\\|Event name\\|Booking reference\\|Provider header\\|Denomination\\|Provider banner\\|Pay with\\|Price summary\\|Provider\\|Image\\|Placeholder\\|Network image\\|Closed overlay\\|Add \\/ qty\\|Price row\\|Add button\\|Qty control\\|Provider \\+ denomination\\|Code box\\\)" lib/ --include="*.dart")
